source_schema: schemas/1dotRef1.json (used verbatim -- upstream already ships a compiled ShExJ schema, no ShExC translation needed)
comment: 1dotRef1_missingSelfReference: <n1> in { <n1> <p1> <n1> . <n2> <p2> "X" } as <S1> in <S1> { <p1> @<S2> } <S2> { <p2> . } -- n1's <p1> is a self-reference to n1, but the <p2> fact is attached to a DIFFERENT node (n2), so n1 does not conform to S2 and the whole shape must fail; a near-miss variant of 1dotRef1_selfReference to confirm the cycle guard doesn't accidentally short-circuit to success.
